summary: 15-minute conversational screen for a Senior Backend Engineer. Focus on API design, data modelling, concurrency, and operational maturity.

competencies.name: API & system design
competencies.description: Designing clear, evolvable HTTP/service APIs and their data flow.

competencies.name: Data modelling & databases
competencies.description: Schema design, indexing, transactions, consistency trade-offs.

interview_topics.title: API design
questions: Design the API for a job-application service. What are the core endpoints and resources?
How would you evolve that API without breaking existing clients?

interview_topics.title: Data modelling
questions: How would you model the schema behind that service?
Where would you add indexes, and what consistency guarantees matter here?

interview_topics.title: Concurrency & reliability
questions: Two requests try to submit the same application at once — how do you keep it correct?
How do you make a write endpoint safely retryable?

inspector_criteria: Soundness of API and data-model decisions
